project: PRJ03160 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GBN12 (N-12)_GBN43 (N-43) - MFC_ ZeroTime
comment: GORM kit arrived back onshore 19th June. It container Well Explorer equipment and was delivered to SLB. Norsea collected equipment from SLB. 22nd June. MFC24 finger calipers removed and MFC40's added. Kit delivered back to the quay side this morning for loading back out to the GORM.

project: PRJ03335 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-22 - MFC
comment: Equipment has been collected by Dyce Carriers. Transport cost absorbed by Perenco

project: PRJ03259 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9895 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Tools are ready and pulled inside the lubricator. Currently waiting on weather. Wind is up until around 8pm KT. HSE inspection plannned for 2pm

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Continue rigging up on DFA-16. Possibly run slickline tonight. READ kit should be arriving on boat later in the afternoon. Rough estimate for MFC log still ~29th/30th June.

project: PRJ03259 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9895 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Equipment spotted, test tools and prepare for rig up.
